action.reasoning: Observation: Best bal_acc=0.5129 (val~50.5%) with ResNet50+pretrain+RandAug+Focal(gamma=2)+1/sqrt sampler+AdamW5e-4+cosine100ep; many=0.757/medium=0.53/few=0.226; val plateaus ~48-49% early. Curves show quick convergence then fluctuation. Analysis: Strong head performance but tail lags (classic LT issue); focal+sampler helps but not enough; decoupled training (train backbone+head with rebalancing then re-train balanced classifier on frozen feats) often boosts tail acc without much head drop. Decision: Implement 2-stage in train.py (stage1: 60ep current setup; stage2: freeze backbone, CE loss, strong balanced sampler 1/counts, smaller LR=1e-5, 40ep); track best by val_acc across stages; this should improve few-shot and overall bal_acc; submit_eval immediately after (time ~7min OK for budget).
